name: @ggsvelte-spike/browser
description: Throwaway M0a spikes needing a real browser: declaration-only children (M0a-1), compositing strata + pointer-events (M0a-6), browser-measurer half of layout (M0a-3). vitest 4 browser mode + Playwright chromium. Retired from repo tooling (lint/knip); still runnable manually.
